headline: Meta's acquisition of a robotics startup signals a major leap in humanoid AI development, potentially reshaping the robotics landscape.

sections.title: News
items: Meta buys robotics startup to bolster its humanoid AI ambitions, a move critical for the future of humanoid AI.
Pentagon's new deals with Nvidia, Microsoft, and AWS to deploy AI emphasize a growing focus on secure AI implementations on classified networks.
Anthropic's potential $900B+ valuation round, if it happens, could redefine investment trends in AI sector.

sections.title: Research
items: OmniRobotHome presents a multi-camera platform for real-time human-robot interaction, offering insights into advanced robotics interfaces.
FlexiTac introduces a revolutionary low-cost, open-source tactile sensing solution that could democratize robotic sensory technology.
LaST-R1 explores adaptive physical latent reasoning for VLA models, pushing boundaries in robotics learning applications.

sections.title: Startups
items: This startup's mechanistic interpretability tool simplifies debugging of LLMs, potentially enhancing safety in AI deployments.
The stealth startup with brainless human clones aims to transform perceptions of what AI-driven human imitation can achieve.
Legal AI startup Legora hits $5.6B valuation, intensifying the competition in legal AI and showcasing robust market demand.

action_item: Review OmniRobotHome's multi-camera platform research for potential integration into SignalForge's capabilities.
